alerts.description: BAL(General Manager Step) - Credit Check - Credit rejected
BAL(General Manager Step) - Credit Check - Credit approved

BAL(Risk Manager Step) - Credit Check - Credit approved

Credit Check Slovenia - Final Rejection by GM

FRA - Credit Check Accepted Kia Flex
FRA - Credit Check Approved - Risk Analyst notification
FRA - Credit Check Recalled Kia Flex
FRA - Credit Check Rejected KIA Flex
Hub NEE - Credit Check - Credit rejected
Hub SEE BGR - Credit Check - Credit approved

SEE - Email notification when credit check is rejected

UKR(General Manager Step) - Credit Check - Credit approved

UKR(Risk Manager Step) - Credit Check - Credit approved

fieldUpdates.name: Document Check Decision Date

Risk Analyst approver : Current User Id
Set Final Decision Date to Null

fieldUpdates.formula: Case( Subsidiary_Indicator__c , '25001','France', '25002','France', '25003','France', '38001','Italy', '4001','Central Europe', '19101','Central Europe', '19102','Central Europe', '34801','Central Europe', '68801','Central Europe', '70301','Central Europe', '70501','Central Europe', '75601','Central Europe', '61601','Poland', '64301','HUB NEE', '80401','HUB NEE', '42801','HUB NEE', '44001','HUB NEE', '23301','HUB NEE', '11201','HUB NEE', '39801','HUB NEE', '79201','HUB SEE', '10001','HUB SEE', '30001','HUB SEE', '64201','HUB SEE', '35601','INDIA', '34802','Central Europe', 'International')
fieldUpdates.name: Set Risk Domain Text
Set Status Approval Proposed by FM
Set Status Approval Proposed by RM
Set Status Rejection Proposed by FM
Set Status Rejection Proposed by RM
Set Status on Reject (Buffer) Reject RM
Set Status on Reject (Buffer) Reject RA
Set Status on Reject Final Rej by GM
Set Status on Reject Rej by SG
Set Status to Submited to SG Approval

fieldUpdates.description: Field update action with the Re-evaluate Workflow Rules after Field Change option checked. Used in project "France Stratégie Risques"
fieldUpdates.name: Status: Submitted by SalesReevalWF
Status: Rejected by Risk Manager ORIGIN

fieldUpdates.description: Track date when status of credit check is changed from submitted to risk queue to registered .
fieldUpdates.name: Submission risk Date

fieldUpdates.description: When process is submited by sales manager the Risk Approval submission date is not populated
fieldUpdates.name: Verify Risk Approval Date
set Number Of Submit to Zero

rules.description: Send Email when credit check is created

rules.fullName: FRA Credit Check Set Field Value 1
rules.description: this workflow will set the value of the lead if field based on the value of the account lead value, only if this value is not already field on the CC
rules.formula: AND( $User.Bypass_Workflow__c == false, ISBLANK(Lead_Id__c ), !ISBLANK(Account__c), OR(Identification_Criteria__c == 'ORIGIN TEMSYS', Identification_Criteria__c == 'ORIGIN PARCOURS'), RecordType.DeveloperName == 'CreditCheckFrance' )

rules.fullName: FRA Credit Check Set Field Value 2
rules.description: this workflow will set the value of the contract number field based on the value of the account Contract number value, only if this value is not already field on the CC
rules.formula: AND( $User.Bypass_Workflow__c == false, ISBLANK(Contract_Number__c), !ISBLANK(Account__c), OR(Identification_Criteria__c == 'ORIGIN TEMSYS', Identification_Criteria__c == 'ORIGIN PARCOURS'), RecordType.DeveloperName == 'CreditCheckFrance' )

rules.description: This workflow will fire only for Bulgaria, Turkey, Greece and Romania
rules.formula: AND( OR( Subsidiary_Indicator__c == "79201",Subsidiary_Indicator__c == "30001",Subsidiary_Indicator__c == "30002", Subsidiary_Indicator__c == "64201", Subsidiary_Indicator__c == "10001",Subsidiary_Indicator__c == "64301",Subsidiary_Indicator__c == "80401",Subsidiary_Indicator__c == "42801",Subsidiary_Indicator__c == "44001",Subsidiary_Indicator__c == "23301",Subsidiary_Indicator__c == "11201",Subsidiary_Indicator__c == "39801") , Recall_Record__c == true)

rules.fullName: India - Email notification to owner for rejection
rules.description: Work flow rule to send Final Rejection email to the owner.
NEE Risk Analyst Final Approve then check Derogation Limit For email Notification
NEE Risk Analyst Final Approve then check Derogation Limit For email Notification

rules.fullName: Nee - Risk Manager Bypass FP TRUE
rules.description: An email will fire when for Nee in Risk Manager Step when Final Approval
rules.formula: AND( Require_Final_Decision_by_GM__c =False,Require_SG_approval__c = False, NEE_Risk_Manager_Flag__c = true, OR(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , "Accepted")), OR(Subsidiary_Indicator__c='44001', Subsidiary_Indicator__c='42801', Subsidiary_Indicator__c='23301'))

rules.fullName: Nee - UKR - Risk Manager Bypass FP TRUE
rules.description: An email will fire when for Nee in Risk Manager Step when Final Approval
rules.formula: AND( Require_Final_Decision_by_GM__c =False,Require_SG_approval__c = False, NEE_Risk_Manager_Flag__c = true, OR(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , "Accepted")), OR(Subsidiary_Indicator__c='80401'))

rules.fullName: SEE - Bulgaria - Notification to GM for SG Approval
rules.description: Notification to GM when the final decision is taken by SG

rules.fullName: SEE - Email notification 2 months before expiration of guarantee
rules.description: Notification to the Risk Analysts and to the request creator to be sent with 2 months before the Guarantee Expiration Date

rules.fullName: SEE - Email notification to owner for rejection
rules.description: Work flow rule to send Final Rejection email to the owner.

rules.fullName: SEE - Greece - Notification to GM for SG Approval
rules.description: Notification to GM when the final decision is taken by SG
Notification to GM for all the final decisions performed by the Credit manager Refactoring: Criteria/Filtering on Greece users (Subsidiary: 30001) and User Role 'Greece Risk Management'.
rules.formula: AND(Subsidiary__c ='Greece', ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Accepted'), OR(CONTAINS(Final_decision_maker__r.Profile.Name, 'Risk Manager'), AND(CONTAINS(Final_decision_maker__r.UserRole.Name, 'Greece Risk Management'), ISPICKVAL( Final_decision_maker__r.Subsidiary_Indicator__c , '30001')) ))

rules.fullName: SEE - Romania - Notification to GM for SG Approval
rules.description: Notification to GM when the final decision is taken by SG

rules.fullName: SEE - Turkey - Notification to GM for SG Approval
rules.description: Notification to GM when the final decision is taken by SG

rules.fullName: Send an Email To CC owner on Final Rejection by RA

tasks.description: Vous devez compléter votre demande d'en cours
tasks.subject: Demande à représenter

tasks.description: A task has been created and assigned to you to provide more info on your credit check request
tasks.subject: Recheck Needed

tasks.description: A task has been created and assigned to you to provide more info on your credit check request
tasks.subject: Recheck Needed
